stemHtml: Which of the following scenarios will most likely produce advection fog?

options.a: Morning in autumn with freezing temperature over land but still a couple degrees above freezing over sea, with a slight wind from sea to land.
options.b: A mild moist airstream flowing over colder surfaces with a wind in excess of 30 kt.
options.c: A light breeze blowing colder air out to sea.
options.d: Warm moist air settling over a warmer surface under no-wind conditions.
